# Stroke Clinical Decision Support

> Client-side, offline-capable stroke CDS toolkit (v6.9.24): acute ischemic & hemorrhagic stroke pathways, 24 calculators, an evidence atlas (58 landmark trials, 10 active trials), guideline summaries, and a trial screener. Institution-neutral and evidence-based.

Decision support only — NOT medical advice and NOT a substitute for clinical judgment. Institution-neutral and evidence-based; verify against primary sources and local policy before any patient care decision.

## Machine-readable data (static JSON API)
- [API manifest](https://rkalani1.github.io/stroke/data/index.json): all endpoints + addressable routes
- [Completed trials](https://rkalani1.github.io/stroke/data/atlas/completed-trials.json)
- [Active trials](https://rkalani1.github.io/stroke/data/atlas/active-trials.json)
- [Recommendations](https://rkalani1.github.io/stroke/data/atlas/recommendations.json)
- [Citations](https://rkalani1.github.io/stroke/data/atlas/citations.json)
- [Guidelines index](https://rkalani1.github.io/stroke/data/guidelines/index.json)
- [Management cards](https://rkalani1.github.io/stroke/data/management-cards.json)
- [Generic BP protocols](https://rkalani1.github.io/stroke/data/generic-protocols.json)
- [What's new feed](https://rkalani1.github.io/stroke/whats-new.json)
- [Calculators index](https://rkalani1.github.io/stroke/data/calculators-index.json)

## Addressable views (hash routes)
- `#/encounter` — Encounter workflow
- `#/protocols` — Protocols & algorithms (institution-neutral)
- `#/protocols/ischemic` — Acute ischemic stroke pathways
- `#/protocols/ich` — Intracerebral hemorrhage
- `#/protocols/calculators` — Calculators
- `#/research` — Evidence atlas / guidelines
- `#/trials` — Trial screener / matrix
- `#/education` — Education hub

## For AI agents
- A stroke-CDS MCP server (in the repo under `/mcp`) exposes the calculators and atlas as callable tools.
- Each JSON endpoint carries `_meta` (schemaVersion, appVersion, checksum, source, disclaimer).
- No hospital-specific institutional content is published here; the site is institution-neutral by design.

## Policy
- Not medical advice. Verify against primary sources (PMIDs/DOIs included in the atlas) and local policy.
- License: Content for clinical reference by qualified clinicians. No warranty.
